nodes.name: pre-bash-dev-server-block.test.js
nodes.summary: Test suite for the pre-bash dev-server-block hook, verifying that commands which would start dev servers (e.g., npm run dev) are blocked or allowed according to hook rules.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Main test runner that enumerates all scenarios for dev-server-blocking hook, spawning the hook script with various commands and asserting blocking/pass-through behavior.

nodes.name: pre-bash-reminders.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the pre-bash reminders hook, checking that reminder messages are injected into hook stdout for specific bash command patterns.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Exercises the reminders hook by running it with various commands and asserting the expected reminder text appears in output.

nodes.name: run-with-flags-truncation.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests the payload-truncation behavior of the run-with-flags hook wrapper, verifying oversized stdin is truncated before passing to hook scripts.

nodes.name: session-activity-tracker.test.js
nodes.summary: Comprehensive tests for the session-activity-tracker hook, covering metric recording, CSV row storage, and multi-session tracking across isolated home directories.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Exhaustive test runner for session-activity-tracker covering initialization, metric accumulation, file paths, and edge cases across hundreds of scenarios.

nodes.name: stop-hooks-stdout.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests that stop hooks emit their messages to stdout as required by the Claude Code hook protocol, validating both direct execution and run-with-flags wrapper paths.

nodes.name: suggest-compact.test.js
nodes.summary: Large test suite for the suggest-compact hook, verifying context-threshold detection, counter persistence, and message formatting for the compaction suggestion feature.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Main test driver for suggest-compact, covering threshold triggers, counter file management, suppression flags, and edge cases for context-window compaction prompts.

nodes.name: test_insaits_security_monitor.py
nodes.summary: Python test suite for the INSAITS security monitor hook, testing content extraction, anomaly detection, SDK error handling, and audit log writing with both fail-open and fail-closed modes.

nodes.name: test_clean_scan_writes_audit_and_uses_environment_options
nodes.summary: Verifies that a clean security scan correctly writes an audit log entry and respects environment variable configuration options.

nodes.name: test_critical_anomaly_blocks_and_writes_feedback
nodes.summary: Tests that a critical security anomaly causes the hook to block execution and write feedback to the audit log.

nodes.name: test_noncritical_anomaly_warns_without_blocking
nodes.summary: Ensures that non-critical anomalies produce a warning in the audit log without blocking the hook execution.

nodes.name: hooks.test.js
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for the full ECC hooks pipeline, exercising hooks end-to-end with real plugin configs, session payloads, and file system isolation.

nodes.name: runHookWithInput
nodes.summary: Spawns a hook script with a given JSON input payload and returns its stdout, stderr, and exit code for assertion.

nodes.name: runHookCommand
nodes.summary: Executes a hook command string by resolving it from plugin settings and running it with a test environment, supporting both sync and async hook modes.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Comprehensive integration test runner covering all ECC hooks including session start, pre-tool, post-tool, and stop hooks with realistic plugin configurations.

nodes.name: agent-compress.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the agent-compress library module, verifying compression and decompression of agent conversation data for context management.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Test suite driver for agent-compress covering compression ratios, round-trip fidelity, edge cases with empty input, and large payload handling.

nodes.name: changed-files-store.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the changed-files-store library, validating file change tracking, persistence, and retrieval used by the ECC hooks pipeline.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Test runner for changed-files-store covering add, remove, list, and clear operations as well as persistence across process boundaries.

nodes.name: cost-estimate.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the cost-estimate library module, checking token count to cost calculation accuracy across different Claude model pricing tiers.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Runs cost estimation tests against various token counts and model names, asserting correct dollar-value output.

nodes.name: dry-run.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the dry-run library utility, verifying that dry-run mode correctly suppresses file writes and command executions while logging intended actions.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Test driver for dry-run utilities validating suppression behavior, log output, and flag parsing across multiple usage patterns.

nodes.name: inspection.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the inspection library, validating skill-run payload construction, hook input inspection, and content extraction used across ECC diagnostics.

nodes.name: makeSkillRun
nodes.summary: Factory helper that constructs a synthetic skill-run payload object for use in inspection tests.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Exercises the inspection library across multiple payload types, asserting correct field extraction and serialization.
